revision_context: Use current Gloucester forms from the portal when available.

forms.local_label: Notice of Referral to Probation Officer

placeholder_rule: Use the placeholder only for missing identifiers, addresses, phone numbers, driver license number, attorney/judge/probation-office contact details, and similar fields that are required by a form but absent from the available case materials.
